parsed.simulated_user_message: If I actually hit send, I think I’ll get a rush of anxiety, like I’m exposing myself again, but maybe a reply will let me see the business is still moving. I worry that the panic will keep me up at night, so I’m planning to try a quick breathing routine before I log on. If it works, it could give me a little confidence boost and stop the loop of avoiding everything.
